summary: parket-helper@5.8.1: child_process shell execution flagged, intent unverified
details: index.js imports child_process and invokes execSync with bash and zsh shell commands. Without traced-code corroboration of what is being executed and when (install time, import time, or only on explicit user invocation), the intent cannot be confirmed. The shell-exec pattern alone is consistent with both legitimate tooling (helper CLIs, build orchestration) and with installer-harm shapes (post-install dropper, env scraper). No hardcoded attacker C2, credential-path read, or known-bad-infrastructure fetch was observed in the available evidence.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
